💛 Meet your child's caregiver

A home-based program built around real connection

Ale runs her childcare right out of her Fremont home, where every day mixes structured, bilingual learning with the everyday warmth of family life. Lessons move naturally between English and Spanish — colors, shapes, numbers, letters, and feelings — so children build vocabulary in both languages without it ever feeling like "schoolwork."

With a small group size, Ale gets to know each child individually: their pace, their personality, and what helps them feel secure. Days are filled with hands-on art, music, outdoor play, and plenty of cuddles in between.

Small group, big attention Hands-on bilingual learning Home-cooked meals Consistent, loving routine
📚 Curriculum

What your little one will learn

Borrowed straight from the walls of Ale's classroom — every theme is taught and reinforced in both English and Spanish.

🎨

Colors

Los Colores

Naming, mixing, and painting with every color of the rainbow.

🔺

Shapes

Las Formas

Circles, squares, triangles — spotted in toys, art, and snacks.

🔢

Numbers

Los Números

Counting together through songs, games, and daily routines.

📅

Days & Calendar

Los Días

Learning the days of the week and what makes today special.

😊

Emotions

Las Emociones

Putting feelings into words, in two languages, every day.

🔤

Alphabet

El Abecedario

Letters, sounds, and early literacy in English and Spanish.

🕗 A typical day

A routine little ones can count on

Predictable days help children feel safe and ready to learn. Here's a sample of how time flows at Ale's — it can flex a little depending on the group.

🍽️
All meals included

Breakfast, a snack, and lunch are provided every day — no need to pack a lunchbox.

8:00 AM🚪
Welcome & free playDrop-off, hugs, and choosing a favorite activity
9:00 AM🥣
BreakfastA healthy start to the day, together at the table
9:30 AM🗣️
Circle time & bilingual lessonsSongs, calendar, colors, and letters in English & Spanish
10:30 AM🎨
Crafts & outdoor playArt projects, bubbles, and fresh air in the yard
12:00 PM🍽️
LunchA warm, home-cooked meal
1:00 PM😴
Quiet timeNaps and rest for little bodies and minds
3:00 PM🍎
Snack & activitiesAfternoon snack followed by games or sensory play
4:30 PM🧸
Free play & pickup beginsWinding down as families arrive
5:30 PM👋
ClosingSee you tomorrow!
